name: Verify total number of menu items in Administration page
description: Verify that the Administration page displays the expected total number of menu items in the left navigation panel
descriptionHtml: Verify that the Administration page displays the expected total number of menu items in the left navigation panel

testStage.description: Verify that the Administration page displays the expected total number of menu items in the left navigation panel

steps.name: Verifies that the number of elements matching the locator is equal to the expected count
